instruction: Preserve the latest 4 user directives and 4 assistant responses around shared task IDs, memory sync, steering-count mismatch, and loop metric criteria.
input: User challenged why two visible surfaces both showed T01, requested the latest four-turn memory sync, flagged that the steering log only showed 6 items while the count said 11, and questioned why only one autonomous loop exists while many items are counted as steering.
output: The repo clarified that T01 currently represents the coarse nav system, synced the latest turns into memory artifacts, removed steering-log truncation so the panel now shows all 11 steering entries, and preserved the metric distinction that steering traces are artifact counts while loop count only measures completed autonomous cycles written into repo state.
